mnemonics: H2-WHOA: Helpful (Uses), Wasteful (Practices), Overuse, Availability & Quality
keyPoints: Water is a finite resource essential for life and ecosystems
Human activities like agriculture, industry, and urbanization significantly impact both water availability and quality
Pollution from various sources (including e-waste leaching) degrades water quality and reduces safe water availability
commonMistakes: Thinking water scarcity is only about quantity, ignoring quality issues
Believing groundwater is an unlimited resource that cannot be polluted
Overlooking how improper e-waste disposal contributes to heavy metal contamination in water sources
